caption: A man with dark hair and a blue button-down shirt wearing a headset microphone stands against a dark background. Behind him is a white wall featuring the logos "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE". The man speaks, shifting his gaze and facial expressions as he talks. Across the bottom of the scene, a blue graphic overlay appears and changes. Initially, it displays "SPONSORED BY" next to an "INFO-OBJECTS" logo, and text that reads "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015 Fairmont Hotel - Valley Room San Jose, CA". This later transitions to identify the speaker as "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul" with the titles "CEO" and "infoobjects" listed below. In the final sequence, the graphic shifts again, showing "#BigDataSV 2015" and a glimpse of a laptop on a table in front of the speaker.
